premioId.description: Unique business ID for the award ceremony (referenced in movies.awards.awardId)

titulo.description: Name of the award ceremony (e.g., Goya, Oscars)

categorias.description: List of specific categories belonging to this award (1:N Relation)

id.description: Unique ID for the specific category within this award

nombre.description: Descriptive name of the category (e.g., Best Film, Best Director)

anyos.description: List of years this award has been held (e.g., [2024, 2025, 2026])
